name: @promptowl/contextnest-cli
description: CLI for structured AI agent knowledge bases — versioned documents, deterministic queries, integrity verification, and MCP integration
author: PromptOwl <hello@promptowl.ai> (https://promptowl.ai)

scripts.postinstall:
echo "
  Context Nest CLI installed successfully.

  Get started:
    ctx init --starter developer    # Engineering vault (in a codebase)
    ctx init --starter personal     # Personal second brain (no codebase needed)
    ctx init --starter executive    # Strategy vault
    ctx init --starter analyst      # Research / analysis vault
    ctx init --starter team         # Team knowledge base
    ctx init --starter sales        # Sales enablement vault
    ctx init --list-starters        # See all options

  Or just run: ctx init

  Docs: https://github.com/PromptOwl/ContextNest
  Context Nest by PromptOwl — https://promptowl.ai
"
